updateInstructionsforWebsite: npm run build --------- scp -r dist/* debian@51.79.65.31:/srv/scx-site/dist/ -------- sudo caddy fmt --overwrite /etc/caddy/Caddyfile ----------- sudo caddy validate --config /etc/caddy/Caddyfile ------------- sudo systemctl reload caddy
updateInstructions: typically only need to build and upload, no caddy reload for smaller simple updates

pref.title: Preferred modes of payment
pref.intro: In full transparency, we’d rather give back to the community than pass on  processing fees. In that spirit, here are our preferred modes of payment.
pref.rbc: Direct transfer to finances.scx@gmail.com (for RBC clients)
pref.cash: Cash on your first class (please arrive early)
pref.square: Square (click on Proceed to Square Payment)

hero.desc: Review your items and complete payment.

empty.message: No items to pay. Go back to registration.

payment.comingSoon: Online payment will be hooked up shortly.

register.title: Registration
register.subtitle: Welcome, or welcome again to SCX - Choose your adventure!
register.error: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again.
register.spinnerMessage: Creating registration(s), we'll take you to the payment and confirmation page afterwards!
register.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one class.
register.studentRebate_help: Applies a $40 discount per selected class (never below $0).

hero.desc: At Swing ConneXion, our group classes are structured so anyone can learn swing dances easily.
Every Wednesday at Café La Ligne Verte (2531 Ontario Est), come and try out swing dance... for free! Intro class at 7pm 19h, followed by three sets of live jazz and swing music!
hero.ctaReserve: Visit the Mercredis Swing FB page

hero.desc: Since 2007, Swing ConneXion supports live swing music in Montreal! Every Wednesday at Café La Ligne Verte (2531 Ontario Est), we have three sets of live music at 8pm. Curious about swing dancing? Come over at 7pm for a free intro class!
hero.ctaReserve: Visit the Mercredis Swing FB page

hero.desc: Personalized sessions to improve fast, at your own pace.

contact.intro: We'd love to hear from you. Write or call us if you have any questions or comments about our school.

hero.desc: A passionate crew powering Montréal’s swing scene.
